final_prompt.prompt:
Create a documentary-style street photography image of a Varanasi morning scene on the Ganges.

Style/medium: needs a "纪实摄影" documentary aesthetic — references in the spirit of Henri Cartier-Bresson decisive-moment street photography, Steve McCurry color documentary tradition, Raghu Rai Indian photojournalism heritage; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include 虔诚的信徒 as focal subjects, 晨雾中的船只 as secondary elements
Scene/backdrop: must include 恒河晨浴 setting at 瓦拉纳西
Lighting/mood: needs a warm morning light atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve the 异域文化气息 cultural authenticity of the Indian setting
Avoid:
